name: Eagle Pack Reduced Fat Adult Dry Dog Food
description: Help keep your pooch in shape with Eagle Pack Natural Dry Reduced Fat Dog Food, Pork, Chicken & Fish Formula. This recipe is specifically designed with a balance of proteins, carbohydrates and fewer calories to support healthy weight loss in overweight or less active adult dogs. But don’t worry––this leaner formula doesn’t mean your dog will get less nutrients. This special recipe is formulated with glucosamine, omega fatty acids and antioxidants to support joint health, skin health and a strong immune system. Bone appétit!
